zh.Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾吉文代爾 白 利朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Simon de Varde於1130年出生在英國越可爾吉賽利時，他的父親Osbert de la Warde42歲，母親Cecily de la Fontaine35歲。他於1154年與Maud Neville在英國越可爾吉賽利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1181年2月2日在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾吉文代爾 白 利朋
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Simon de Varde于1130年出生在英国越可爾吉賽利时，他的父亲Osbert de la Warde42岁，母亲Cecily de la Fontaine35岁。他于1154年与Maud Neville在英国越可爾吉賽利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1181年2月2日在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Varde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Fernando, Gerardo, Jose, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Rafael, Agustin, Alberto, Alina, Amalia.  Italian Antonio, Salvatore, Angelo, Antimo, Heriberto, Aniello, Carlo, Carmine, Caesar, Ciro, Dino, Eliseo.

Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: from verde ‘green’ (from Latin viridis), used as a nickname for someone who habitually dressed in this color or had green eyes, and, in Italy, also as a medieval personal name. Compare Laverde and Lo Verde .
Spanish: in some cases, a habitational name from any of the places called Verde, for example in A Coruña (Galicia).

variants.name: Laverde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jorge, Juan, Manuel, Adriana, Alvaro, Bernardo, Elena, Ezequiel, Francisca, Francisco, Jaime, Liliana.  Italian Dario, Leonardo, Salvatore.
Spanish; Italian (mainly La Verde): variant of Verde ‘green’, with (fused) definite article la.

variants.name: Verdi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Ciro, Salvatore, Carmine, Pasquale, Antonio, Cesare, Gaetano, Geno, Giuseppe, Philomena, Rocco.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Verde  .

variants.name: Verdone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Marco, Salvatore, Agostino, Carlo, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Giuseppe.
Italian: from an augmentative of   Verde  .

variants.name: Lo Verde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Francesco, Vito, Antonio, Filomena, Gaspare, Giuseppe, Nichola, Nino, Santo, Vincenzo.
Italian (southern; also Loverde): variant of the nickname Verde 1 ‘green’, with the addition of the definite article lo.

variants.name: Virdi
meanings: Italian (mainly Sicily): regional variant of   Verde  .
Indian (Punjab): unexplained.

variants.name: Verdejo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Rafael, Jose, Natividad, Adela, Alberto, Alicia, Ana, Angel, Candido, Carlos, Catalino, Cruz.
Spanish:
variant of Berdejo, a habitational name from Berdejo, a town in Zaragoza.

variants.name: Verdino
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Verdino, a pet form of Verde .

variants.name: Verducci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Nicola, Pasco, Rocco, Vittorio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Verde   1.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Simon de Varde was born in 1130, in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Osbert de la Warde, was 42 and his mother, Cecily de la Fontaine, was 35. He married Maud Neville in 1154, in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 2 February 1181, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Simon de Varde est né en 1130, à Guiseley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Osbert de la Warde, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Cecily de la Fontaine, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Maud Neville en 1154, à Guiseley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 2 février 1181, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Simon de Varde 1130 in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osbert de la Warde 42 und seine Mutter Cecily de la Fontaine 35. Er hat 1154 in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England Maud Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 2. Februar 1181 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Simon de Varde è nato il nel 1130 nel Guiseley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Osbert de la Warde, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Cecily de la Fontaine, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Maud Neville nel 1154, nel Guiseley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 2 febbraio 1181, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Simon de Vardeが1130年にイギリスヨークシュアイアグイセリーで生まれた時，父Osbert de la Wardeは42歳，母Cecily de la Fontaineは35歳であった。1154年にイギリスヨークシュアイアグイセリーでMaud Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1181年2月2日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Simon de Varde(이)가 1130년 영국 요르크실르 길즈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osbert de la Warde(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily de la Fontaine(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1154년 영국 요르크실르 길즈리에서 Maud Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1181년 2월 2일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Simon de Varde nasceu em 1130, em Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Osbert de la Warde, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de la Fontaine, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Neville em 1154, em Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1181, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Simon de Varde родился в 1130 г. в местности гуисели, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Osbert de la Warde было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily de la Fontaine, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Neville в 1154 г. в местности гуисели, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 2 февраля 1181 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Simon de Varde nació en 1130, en Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Osbert de la Warde, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Cecily de la Fontaine, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Maud Neville en 1154, en Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1181, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
